name: Warpath Operational Intel
description: Intel about operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through active participation in military activities. This intel is of value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders. Quartermaster Traders locations: Amarr: Amarr, Gergish, Tash-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime. Caldari: New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen. Gallente: Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent. Minmatar: Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.
